faqs.question: How do I submit a campaign idea?
faqs.answer: Contact Us using the Call To Action submission form. We review every suggestion and may turn it into a live call to action.

faqs.question: How can I get in touch?
faqs.answer: Head to our Contact Uspage for general inquiries, volunteer interest, or partnership opportunities.

faqs.question: What is a CTA?
faqs.answer: A CTA (Call To Action) is a campaign asking people to take a specific action — like sending a pre-written email to decision-makers — to help animals.

faqs.question: How does the one-click email work?
faqs.answer: When you click a CTA email link, it opens your default email app with the recipients, subject, and body already filled in. Just hit send. For maximum impact, send from every email address you have.
